package.name: woosh_sensor_bridge
package.description: Woosh TR-200 SDK sensor bridge package. Converts Woosh WebSocket SDK data (LiDAR, odometry) into standard ROS topics. Publishes /scan (LaserScan), /odom (Odometry), and TF(odom→base_link). Used by all modes: standalone, GMapping, Cartographer, AMCL.
